Home → Discography → Bone Brothers III

Bone Brothers III

2008 · Siccness.net

The third and most acclaimed Bone Brothers album by Bizzy Bone and Layzie Bone, widely considered the best of the trilogy. Unlike Vol. 2 which recycled earlier verses, this is all new material with stronger production from Batkave, Jaz, Thin C, Steve Vicious and Cricket. The track “Cash Money” features The Notorious B.I.G., reusing his original verse from “The What,” which he later rewrote before its official release on his debut album “Ready to Die“.

"I went through the drama and caught up in all of the lies, whatever was on my side, Christ provided my body, you told me I'm Bryon, and this is your life."

— Streetlife

10 This Is a Warning produced by Batkave feat. Thin C & Cuttroat Raw ▷

12 If You Wanna Get Paid produced by Thin C ▷
13 Momma produced by Jaz ▷
